column1: # - REPORT_ONLY: cleanup audit only reports metrics (counts/dup names/large files), no action pressure.
# - STRICT_CANONICAL: canonical zone, expected to stay organized and auditable.
coordination_docs|REPORT_ONLY|bitpod/docs/coordination|legacy coordination drop zone pending relocation; report metrics only
cj_pm_dropbox|REPORT_ONLY|local-workspace/local-cj-pm-only|explicit user-managed keep zone; no cleanup pressure
codex_state_home|REPORT_ONLY|local-workspace/local-codex|codex state home; preserve architecture, but do not blindly mirror machine auth/secrets
local_archive|REPORT_ONLY|local-workspace/local-archive|preserved local historical material; monitor size and keep browseable
local_handoffs|STRICT_CANONICAL|local-workspace/local-handoffs|active local handoff exchange zone; keep minimal and self-describing
local_trash_delete|REPORT_ONLY|local-workspace/local-trash-delete|disposal quarantine; do not replicate; review only for purge
local_working_files|REPORT_ONLY|local-workspace/local-working-files|active scratch/work queue; move dated inactive bundles to local-archive
legacy_agent_bootstrap|REPORT_ONLY|bitpod-docs/archive/legacy-context/sector-feeds-agent-bootstrap|archived non-feed bootstrap material moved out of sector-feeds; preserve and monitor only
